name: Grand Kru County (Liberia)
description: White field with a vertical yellow stripe near the fly; the Liberian national flag is the canton in the upper hoist and a green tree-and-landscape device occupies the centre-fly area.
history: Created in 1984 from territory taken from Maryland and Sinoe counties; the flag follows the design pattern of the original counties' flags.

features.symbolism: Grand Kru as part of the Republic of Liberia
the natural resources and forests of the county
